modules.title: Introduction to the Tidyverse
modules.description: Learn dplyr and ggplot2 fundamentals through hands-on practice with a Socratic AI pair partner.

modules.title: Recoding Variables with mutate()
modules.description: Master case_when() and recode() for range-based and value-replacement recoding, using the midwest, msleep, and diamonds datasets.

modules.title: Summarising Data with summarise()
modules.description: Compute summary statistics globally and by group using summarise() and .by, across the msleep, diamonds, and midwest datasets.
